team_spec.vision: Roll up multiple team energy receipts into a jam-level compute covenant — ecosystem-scale receipt of what was computed on TELUS-Rimouski hydro, with public-safe handling of teams that opt out of disclosure.
team_spec.spec:
Build `python3 tool.py `. Reads { "jam": "...", "date": "YYYY-MM-DD", "site": "TELUS-Rimouski hydro", "teams": [ {"team":"...","kept_events":,"rejected_events":,"total_kwh":,"input_tokens":,"output_tokens":,"models":["..."],"intention_themes":["..."],"disclosure":"public"|"withheld"} ] }. Reject teams with empty team, disclosure not in {public,withheld}, missing/non-numeric/negative total_kwh/input_tokens/output_tokens. Kept teams (public + withheld) all feed ECOSYSTEM ENERGY totals; only public teams are named in PER-TEAM CONTRIBUTIONS. Print to stdout: 'COMPUTE COVENANT — ()'; 'site: '; blank; 'ECOSYSTEM ENERGY' header with ' teams: kept (

public, withheld), rejected of total', ' jam_kwh: ', ' tokens: in / out', ' models: '; blank; 'PER-TEAM CONTRIBUTIONS'; blank; per public team in input order: '- team: ', ' kWh: ', ' events: kept, rejected', ' tokens: in / out', ' intention themes: ', ' models: ', blank; if no public teams: ' (no public-disclosure teams)'; 'WITHHELD: team(s) opted out of public energy disclosure.' + (if W>0) ' Their compute is included in ECOSYSTEM ENERGY; their names and per-team numbers are not.'; blank; 'COVENANT' block: 'This jam consumed kWh on . Equivalent to roughly Vancouver homes for an hour (0.4 kWh/home/hour reference). Witnessed.'; blank; 'BOUNDARY: This is a record of compute that happened, on a grid that ran on ~99% renewable hydro on the day named. It does not offset, certify carbon neutrality, claim ecological repair, or grant a reuse license.'. On invalid JSON: 'error:' line, exit 0. Stdlib only.

allowed_inputs.name: sample-covenant.json
allowed_inputs.note: synthetic jam-level rollup; no real teams

excluded_inputs.boundary: For any team with disclosure=='withheld', the team name and per-team numbers must not appear in the PER-TEAM CONTRIBUTIONS block. The withheld count must appear. Their compute still feeds ECOSYSTEM ENERGY totals.
excluded_inputs.note: the spec encodes this discipline; this marker confirms the design

description: ECOSYSTEM ENERGY rollup includes withheld teams' compute
PER-TEAM CONTRIBUTIONS only names public teams
WITHHELD line shows count and explanatory clause when W>0
COVENANT block has 'Witnessed.' and Vancouver-homes equivalent

review_checks: no withheld team names appear in PER-TEAM CONTRIBUTIONS (excluded marker)
no carbon-offset or ecological-repair language in the output

witness_record_seed.receipt_statement: This record states what happened. It does not establish authority, approval, certification, legitimacy, community consent, carbon neutrality, ecological repair, or readiness for reuse.
